steps.title: Contrast promise with limitation
steps.content: The first sentence describes fusion's promise as a clean energy source. The next sentence qualifies that optimism by saying no laboratory reaction had generated a net energy gain before December 2022.

steps.title: Use a qualifying transition
steps.content: A signals cause, B adds a similar point, and C introduces a specific detail of the prior claim. The transition that means even so or nevertheless fits the limiting counterpoint. The answer is D.
